name: /agent-verify exits one when the verifier emits verdict: disagree (commit blocked per F-3 gate semantics)
command:
printf 'diff stub
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "verdict: disagree"
echo "reason: unsafe change"
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && echo blocked 1>&2
